## Type of Change

<!-- Please carefully check the options that apply to your PR. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes, no API changes)
- [ ] 🚀 Performance improvement

## Mandatory Checklist

<!--
You MUST check off all items before submitting.
PRs with unchecked items will be automatically flagged for revision.
-->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document entirely.
- [ ] I have ensured my code follows the project's strict styling guidelines (ESLint & Prettier).
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any new warnings or errors in the console.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (if applicable).
- [ ] I have thoroughly tested my changes on my local machine.
- [ ] My commits are descriptive and follow the conventional commit format.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings

If your PR introduces visual changes to the UI/UX, you MUST include screenshots or a brief video recording demonstrating the new behavior.
Drag and drop images directly into this editor.
